beneficiary.description: The person or organization that benefits from the license.

consumption_configuration.description: Details about how the license is consumed, including borrowing and provisional configurations.

create_time.description: The time when the license was created.

entitlements.description: The entitlements associated with the license, detailing allowed usage and limits.

home_region.description: The home region where the license is managed.

id.description: The unique identifier for the received license.

issuer.description: Information about the entity that issued the license.

license_metadata.description: Additional metadata related to the license.

product_name.description: The name of the product associated with the license.

product_sku.description: The stock keeping unit (SKU) for the product associated with the license.

received_metadata.description: Metadata about the received status of the license.

status.description: The current status of the license.

validity.description: The time period during which the license is valid.
